political.s: Limited publicly disclosed political donations to federal candidates. No evidence of significant corporate PAC contributions found in OpenSecrets database. Individual executive donations and company political stance are subject to informal discussion online but not formally documented.

charity.s: Company has multi-year pledge of $1.2 million to Boys and Girls Club of Dane County and supports employee assistance fund. Donated 5% of selected product sales to American Red Cross during COVID-19. Focus appears primarily on local Wisconsin causes.
charity.focus: Youth development, community assistance, emergency relief

environment.s: Environmental record rated very poor by Good On You with minimal eco-friendly materials and no evidence of meaningful carbon reduction efforts. Company acknowledges sustainability goals but demonstrates limited action on biodiversity, ocean health, or hazardous chemical reduction in supply chain.

labor.s: Employees rate company 3.7/5 on Glassdoor with 69% recommending to friends. Company offers competitive benefits including 401k match, paid holidays including Juneteenth, and recognized for inclusive hiring of individuals with disabilities. No union representation and non-unionized workforce.

dei.s: All employees participate in DEI training focused on belonging. Recognized as pro-DEI institution refusing to retreat from diversity initiatives. Received exemplary employer recognition for hiring individuals with disabilities. Company leadership publicly committed to diversity-driven innovation.

animals.s: Apparel and workwear retail company; animal testing not applicable to core business model.

guns.s: Sells hard goods including knives and tools through website and retail stores. Does not manufacture firearms. Some product categories include multi-tools and outdoor gear with blade components.

privacy.s: Company has comprehensive privacy policy with opt-out provisions for data sharing with third parties. Shares personal information with carefully screened partners. Complies with state privacy laws but indicates data transmission security cannot be guaranteed.

execPay.s: Limited public disclosure on executive compensation ratios. Company leadership includes CEO Stephanie Pugliese and founder Stephen Schlecht but detailed pay ratio data not readily available in SEC filings reviewed.
